rag_rules: Use validator diagnostics to identify missing EOF errors in AGREE annexes
Ensure AGREE annexes are properly closed with `};` after the contract
Do not add new architecture or features to repair validator diagnostics
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers and existing features in repairs
Preserve existing component structure and connections
Follow AGREE syntax rules for annex placement and contract structure
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assign` only in implementation scope for existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scope for input/output contracts
anti_patterns: Do not add new features or architecture to repair validator diagnostics
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
